subject: Invoice INV-2026-0006 – May Supply & Equipment Order
preview: Attached is our invoice for IT equipment and supply orders for May 2026.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0006 covering IT equipment, office supplies, and professional services for May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 35,420.00
Due Date: June 18, 2026

Please ensure payment is made by the due date. Contact us at invoicing@meridian-supply.com for any queries.

Thank you,
Meridian Supply Co. – Accounts Receivable
